name: Ibew/Sj Cascade
description_short: IBEW/SJ Cascade Federal Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative serving the Salem, OR area with credit union banking services including savings, checking, and lending products.
description_long:
IBEW/SJ Cascade Federal Credit Union operates as a federally chartered credit union serving members of the International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers (IBEW) and San Jose area communities. The institution is a member-owned cooperative financial institution regulated under federal credit union law. The credit union maintains a physical branch location in Salem, Oregon, providing in-person banking services to its membership base. Like all credit unions, it functions as a not-for-profit entity governed by elected member boards rather than external shareholders.

The organization offers standard credit union banking services typical of federal credit unions, including deposit accounts (savings and checking), consumer lending, and member financial services. As a federally chartered credit union, members gain access to NCUA insurance protection on eligible deposits. The institution operates a branch network with at least one physical location serving the Salem metropolitan area, accessible during posted business hours.

As a credit union rather than a traditional bank, IBEW/SJ Cascade emphasizes member ownership and democratic governance. The organization specifically serves IBEW union members and their families, creating a membership-based community model rather than open public banking. This targeted membership structure distinguishes credit unions from commercial banks and aligns member interests through shared union or occupational bonds.

Prospective members should contact the organization directly by phone to confirm current membership eligibility requirements, service offerings, rates, and fees, as limited detailed information is publicly available beyond basic location and contact data. The website content does not provide specific details regarding fee structures, APR rates, account types, or specific loan products, requiring direct inquiry for comprehensive service comparison.
pros: Federal credit union status provides NCUA deposit insurance protection for member accounts
Member-owned cooperative structure means profits benefit members rather than external shareholders
Physical branch location in Salem, OR provides in-person banking services
Serves IBEW union members and families, creating community-focused membership model
Direct phone contact available for account services and member inquiries
Not-for-profit structure typically results in competitive rates compared to commercial banks
cons: Limited publicly available information about specific rates, fees, and account terms
Restricted membership eligibility (primarily IBEW members and families) excludes general public
Only one publicly listed branch location limits geographic accessibility
Minimal online presence with basic website information prevents detailed service comparison
No published information about digital banking capabilities or online account services
best_for: IBEW union members seeking banking services tailored to union community
Members preferring credit union not-for-profit structure over commercial bank ownership
Consumers in Salem, OR area needing in-person banking relationships and services
Union households seeking member-owned financial institution with shared values
diagnosis: IBEW/SJ Cascade Federal Credit Union is best suited for IBEW union members and their families in the Salem, Oregon area seeking traditional credit union banking services with member-ownership benefits. The primary caveat is that membership eligibility is restricted to union members, and detailed service offerings, rates, and fees require direct contact with the institution as this information is not publicly available online.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.

meta_description: Ibew/sj Cascade — NCUA-insured credit union in Salem, OR. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
